name: vercel-ai.generateText
description: Vercel AI SDK `generateText` (v4+ naming). Input is the user's params object MINUS the `model` constructor (the SDK drops it and records `model` as a sibling field). Output keeps the v4+ field set: `text` / `object` (null for plain text) / `content` (top-level ContentPart array) / `finishReason` / `usage` with `inputTokens`+`outputTokens` (NOT `promptTokens`/`completionTokens`) / `toolCalls` / `toolResults` / `steps` / `reasoning` / `reasoningText` / `sources` / `files` / `warnings` / `providerMetadata`. Empty arrays + undefined fields are pruned by the wrapper.

input.system: You are a tour guide for Edinburgh.
input.prompt: Recommend one thing to do on Arthur's Seat at sunrise.

output.text: Hike up the eastern ridge, you'll catch the sunrise lighting up the Forth before the city wakes up.

content.text: Hike up the eastern ridge, you'll catch the sunrise lighting up the Forth before the city wakes up.
